patches.hypothesis: The refined patch addresses the overfitting issues by ensuring the null check is more robust, handling edge cases, and overcoming other potential issues through additional testing.
patches.original_hypothesis: The bug was caused by the absence of a null check in the method, which resulted in a NullPointerException when the method was called with a null argument.

patches.hypothesis: The bug is caused by the absence of a null check in the method, which leads to a NullPointerException when the header map is null.
The bug was caused by the method returning a new LinkedHashMap instance even when the header map was null. This caused a NullPointerException when the method was called with a null header map.
The method was not checking for null values, which led to a null pointer exception when a null value was passed as an argument.
patches.changes: + null check before creating the new LinkedHashMap
patches.diff: + null check before creating the new LinkedHashMap
